name: Fearflower Nectar
description:
The nectar of a night-blooming desert flower attacks a victim's central nervous system and causes feelings of panic.

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Saving Throw

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 ] damage and Frightened 1 (1 round)

Stage 2 ] damage and Frightened 2 (1 round)

Stage 3 ] damage and Frightened 3 (1 round)
